description: Barrier event configuration for Arcane Barrier mod. Define events that trigger barrier changes.
_comment_structure: Each event has: id (unique), type (event type), enabled (default true), barrier_change (positive=mend, negative=fall), first_time_only (optional, default false), condition (type-specific)
_comment_types: Supported types: block_interact (player interacts with block), entity_kill (player kills entity), dimension_change (player changes dimension), advancement (player completes advancement)
_comment_first_time_only: When true, event only triggers once per player. Subsequent triggers by same player are ignored. Set to false for repeatable events.

events.description: Right-clicking crying obsidian mends the barrier
Killing a wither causes the barrier to fall
Entering the nether causes a significant barrier fall
Obtaining diamond progression mends the barrier slightly
